title: VerificationReceipt
description: A dual-signed completion proof. Both the sink (provider) and source (requester) sign the same EIP-712 struct. Used by CompletionTracker to verify work was done.

sink.description: Ethereum address of the provider who completed work

sinkSignature.description: Sink's EIP-712 signature over the completion receipt

sourceSignature.description: Source's EIP-712 signature over the completion receipt

evidenceHash.description: Optional hash of completion evidence (e.g., output content hash)

nostrEventId.description: Nostr event ID of the NIP-90 result event
